testcase.name: test_auth_login_and_me
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter29_refactor.py:325: in test_auth_login_and_me assert email == "admin@phytonet.ai" E AssertionError: assert 'preview@phytonet.ai' == 'admin@phytonet.ai' E E - admin@phytonet.ai E + preview@phytonet.ai

testcase.name: test_eligibility_fresh_user
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_assistant.py:77: in test_eligibility_fresh_user assert d["is_admin"] is False E assert True is False

testcase.name: test_eligibility_unauthenticated

failure.message: AssertionError: expected 401/403, got 200 assert 200 in (401, 403) + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_assistant.py:82: in test_eligibility_unauthenticated assert r.status_code in (401, 403), f"expected 401/403, got {r.status_code}" E AssertionError: expected 401/403, got 200 E assert 200 in (401, 403) E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_eligibility_after_first_run
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_assistant.py:138: in test_eligibility_after_first_run assert d["free_used"] is True E assert False is True

testcase.name: test_second_run_is_402

failure.message: AssertionError: second run must return 402: 200 {"id":"6a579881d596f59740647a81","user_id":"6a56f593ac21d417dff72944","plant_name":"Ocimum sanctum","disease_name":"Malaria","status":"running","progress":0,"current_stage":"collect_phytochemicals","stages":[],"error":null,"report_id":null,"report_markdown_preview":"","started_at":"2026-07-15T14:26: assert 200 == 402 + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_assistant.py:145: in test_second_run_is_402 assert r.status_code == 402, f"second run must return 402: {r.status_code} {r.text[:300]}" E AssertionError: second run must return 402: 200 {"id":"6a579881d596f59740647a81","user_id":"6a56f593ac21d417dff72944","plant_name":"Ocimum sanctum","disease_name":"Malaria","status":"running","progress":0,"current_stage":"collect_phytochemicals","stages":[],"error":null,"report_id":null,"report_markdown_preview":"","started_at":"2026-07-15T14:26: E assert 200 == 402 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_status_configured

failure.message: requests.exceptions.ConnectTimeout: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='herbal-nexus.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /api/auth/google/status (Caused by ConnectTimeoutError(<HTTPSConnection(host='herbal-nexus.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443) at 0xf882a2b31b50>, 'Connection to herbal-nexus.preview.emergentagent.com timed out. (connect timeout=10)'))

testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connection.py:204: in _new_conn sock = connection.create_connection( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/util/connection.py:85: in create_connection raise err /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/util/connection.py:73: in create_connection sock.connect(sa) E TimeoutError: timed out
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:788: in urlopen response = self._make_request( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:488: in _make_request raise new_e /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:464: in _make_request self._validate_conn(conn) /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:1106: in _validate_conn conn.connect() /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connection.py:759: in connect self.sock = sock = self._new_conn() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connection.py:213: in _new_conn raise ConnectTimeoutError( E urllib3.exceptions.ConnectTimeoutError: (<HTTPSConnection(host='herbal-nexus.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443) at 0xf882a2b31b50>, 'Connection to herbal-nexus.preview.emergentagent.com timed out. (connect timeout=10)')
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/adapters.py:696: in send resp = conn.urlopen( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:842: in urlopen retries = retries.increment( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/util/retry.py:543: in increment raise MaxRetryError(_pool, url, reason) from reason # type: ignore[arg-type] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E urllib3.exceptions.MaxRetryError: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='herbal-nexus.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /api/auth/google/status (Caused by ConnectTimeoutError(<HTTPSConnection(host='herbal-nexus.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443) at 0xf882a2b31b50>, 'Connection to herbal-nexus.preview.emergentagent.com timed out. (connect timeout=10)'))
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: backend/tests/test_iter28_features.py:13: in test_status_configured r = requests.get(f"{BASE_URL}/api/auth/google/status", timeout=10) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/api.py:87: in get return request("get", url, params=params, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/api.py:71: in request return session.request(method=method, url=url, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:651: in request resp = self.send(prep, **send_kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:784: in send r = adapter.send(request, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/adapters.py:717: in send raise ConnectTimeout(e, request=request) E requests.exceptions.ConnectTimeout: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='herbal-nexus.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /api/auth/google/status (Caused by ConnectTimeoutError(<HTTPSConnection(host='herbal-nexus.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443) at 0xf882a2b31b50>, 'Connection to herbal-nexus.preview.emergentagent.com timed out. (connect timeout=10)'))

testcase.name: test_lotus_molweight_no_inchikey_duplicates

failure.message: AssertionError: Duplicate InChIKey skeletons in /lotus/molweight (24 dups) assert 50 == 26 + where 50 = len(['RNBDRQIJTOZYML', 'UACZEBODXTXUMI', 'UACZEBODXTXUMI', 'SWTXHUUBYZNDAJ', 'SWTXHUUBYZNDAJ', 'JALVTHFTYRPDMB', ...]) + and 26 = len({'AIFXMSDWXBFQTF', 'BMQBTHWVNBJSPS', 'CFYZWMOGIXBXRL', 'DARPNBBNASGJNY', 'DHWCRSNZCPDTKZ', 'FYOBRHSIFOGQKX', ...}) + where {'AIFXMSDWXBFQTF', 'BMQBTHWVNBJSPS', 'CFYZWMOGIXBXRL', 'DARPNBBNASGJNY', 'DHWCRSNZCPDTKZ', 'FYOBRHSIFOGQKX', ...} = set(['RNBDRQIJTOZYML', 'UACZEBODXTXUMI', 'UACZEBODXTXUMI', 'SWTXHUUBYZNDAJ', 'SWTXHUUBYZNDAJ', 'JALVTHFTYRPDMB', ...])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:427: in test_lotus_molweight_no_inchikey_duplicates assert len(skeletons) == len(set(skeletons)), ( E AssertionError: Duplicate InChIKey skeletons in /lotus/molweight (24 dups) E assert 50 == 26 E + where 50 = len(['RNBDRQIJTOZYML', 'UACZEBODXTXUMI', 'UACZEBODXTXUMI', 'SWTXHUUBYZNDAJ', 'SWTXHUUBYZNDAJ', 'JALVTHFTYRPDMB', ...]) E + and 26 = len({'AIFXMSDWXBFQTF', 'BMQBTHWVNBJSPS', 'CFYZWMOGIXBXRL', 'DARPNBBNASGJNY', 'DHWCRSNZCPDTKZ', 'FYOBRHSIFOGQKX', ...}) E + where {'AIFXMSDWXBFQTF', 'BMQBTHWVNBJSPS', 'CFYZWMOGIXBXRL', 'DARPNBBNASGJNY', 'DHWCRSNZCPDTKZ', 'FYOBRHSIFOGQKX', ...} = set(['RNBDRQIJTOZYML', 'UACZEBODXTXUMI', 'UACZEBODXTXUMI', 'SWTXHUUBYZNDAJ', 'SWTXHUUBYZNDAJ', 'JALVTHFTYRPDMB', ...])
